results.title: Dependent Section Hidden on Initial Page Load When Parent Has Aluminum Preselected
results.evidence: Frame Type visible with Aluminum preselected ($0); Wheel Set visible (depends on Frame Type which has value); Frame Color visible (depends on Frame Type); Tire Type NOT in DOM (depends on Wheel Set which has no value); Price=$300.00; Add to cart ENABLED

results.title: Dependent Section (Tire Type) Appears When Its Parent (Wheel Set) Gets a Value
results.evidence: After selecting Standard ($25) in Wheel Set: Tire Type appeared in DOM; Price updated to $325.00 (base $300 + Aluminum $0 + Standard $25); Wheel Set subtitle updated to show selected option name; No page reload

results.title: Tire Type Disappears When Wheel Set Deselected Back to None
results.evidence: After selecting None in Wheel Set: Tire Type removed from DOM; Price returned to $300.00; Wheel Set subtitle reverted to 'Personalize your selection further (optional)'; No page reload

results.title: Hidden Section's Previously Selected Value Is Cleared When Parent Deselected
results.evidence: Selected Standard in Wheel Set -> Tire Type visible; Selected Slick in Tire Type ($20); Deselected Wheel Set to None -> Tire Type hides; Re-selected Standard -> Tire Type reappears with None selected (index 3), NOT Slick; Price=$325 (not $345); clearHiddenSectionValues() confirmed working

results.title: Price Recalculates Correctly When Tire Type Hidden - Hidden Option Price Excluded
results.evidence: Full chain: $345.00 (base $300 + Aluminum $0 + Standard $25 + Slick $20); After hiding Tire Type (Wheel Set=None): $300.00 (Aluminum $0 only); Hidden Tire Type price ($20) excluded from total

results.title: Transitive Chain Frame Type to Wheel Set to Tire Type
results.evidence: Initial: Frame Type=Aluminum -> Wheel Set visible, Tire Type hidden (B has no value); After Wheel Set=Standard -> Tire Type visible (chain satisfied); After Wheel Set=None -> Tire Type hides; No page reloads; All computed client-side

results.title: Hidden Optional Section Does Not Block Add to Cart
results.evidence: Wheel Set=None, Tire Type hidden; Add to cart ENABLED; Clicked Add to cart -> succeeded (lineItemId=f112753e-0006-4e71-abd1-f500b78d8ad0 in URL); No validation error for hidden section

results.title: Multiple Sections Depending on Same Parent Show Together
results.evidence: Wheel Set and Frame Color both visible when Frame Type=Aluminum (both depend on Frame Type). Frame Type is required with no None option, so both siblings are always visible. No partial show/hide observed

results.title: Add to Cart with Conditional Section Visible and Configured
results.evidence: Frame Type=Aluminum + Wheel Set=Standard -> Add to cart succeeded; Cart shows: 1. AGENT-TEST-Cond-Frame-Aluminum-20260413, 2. AGENT-TEST-Cond-Wheel-Standard-20260413; Price=$325.00

results.title: Add to Cart with Conditional Section Hidden - Cart Does Not Include Hidden Option
results.evidence: After selecting Slick in Tire Type then deselecting Wheel Set (hiding Tire Type), the cart did not include Tire Type. Cart components list showed only Aluminum + Standard (when Wheel Set visible) or just Aluminum (when Wheel Set=None). Stale Slick value properly cleared by clearHiddenSectionValues()

results.title: CFG-024: Text Input in Parent Section Reveals Dependent Product Section
results.evidence: Text-Driven-Cond product: Only Engraving Line 1 visible initially; Typed 'Hello' -> Style Pack appeared; Cleared text -> Style Pack disappeared; Visibility correctly driven by text input value

results.title: CFG-024: Accessory Section Hidden Until Style Pack Also Has Value
results.evidence: Typed text in Engraving -> Style Pack appeared; Selected Classic in Style Pack -> Accessory appeared; Selected None in Style Pack -> Accessory disappeared; Chained visibility working correctly (Text -> Product -> Product)

results.title: CFG-025: File Upload Reveals Dependent Product Section (Finish Type)
results.evidence: File-Driven-Cond product: Only Design Upload visible initially; Uploaded Logo1.png -> Finish Type appeared; Upload API succeeded; Visibility correctly driven by file presence

results.title: CFG-026: Required File Section Gates Add to Cart
results.evidence: CFG-029 product not seeded in QA environment as of 2026-04-17

results.title: CFG-027: Two Required Siblings Both Hidden When Bundle=None
results.evidence: Two-Req-Siblings product: Bundle Choice visible with None default; Size and Color NOT visible; Add to cart ENABLED (hidden required sections excluded from validation); Price=$120.00

results.title: CFG-027: Add to Cart Enabled Only After Both Required Siblings Filled
results.evidence: Selected Bundle A -> Size and Color appeared (both required *); Add to cart DISABLED; Selected Size -> still DISABLED (Color empty); Selected Color -> Add to cart ENABLED; Price=$170.00

results.title: CFG-028: Deep Chain - Level E Hidden Until Full 4-Level Chain Satisfied
results.evidence: Deep-4-Level-Chain product: Level A preselected (Opt1); Level B visible; Selected options progressively: B->C appeared, C->D appeared, D->E appeared; All 5 sections visible; Price=$340.00; Each level only appeared after parent had value; No page reloads

results.title: CFG-028: Deselecting Mid-Chain to None - Downstream Sections Remain Visible
results.evidence: Level B=LvlB-None ($0 product) selected as first option -> C/D/E remain visible because isSectionVisible() treats None product as valid parent value; Price decreased by B contribution; KNOWN AMBIGUITY per FINDING-1

results.title: CFG-029: Required Child Hidden When Optional Parent Has None - Cart Not Blocked
results.evidence: CFG-029 product not seeded in QA environment

results.title: CFG-029: Required Child Revealed When Optional Parent Gets Real Value - Blocks Cart Until Filled
results.evidence: CFG-029 product not seeded in QA environment

results.title: CFG-027: Bundle-None Does NOT Hide Size and Color Siblings
results.evidence: Selected Bundle A, Size, Color on Two-Req-Siblings product; Then selected Bundle-None ($0 product) -> Size and Color remained visible with values preserved; Price reflected $0 for Bundle-None while Size/Color contributions remained; KNOWN AMBIGUITY per FINDING-1

results.title: CFG-025: Notes Text Section Appears After Finish Type Has Real Value
results.evidence: File-Driven-Cond: Uploaded file -> Finish Type visible; Finish Type=None -> Notes hidden; Selected Matte -> Notes appeared; 3-level chain (File -> Product -> Text) working correctly

results.title: None Product Option Treats Parent as Having a Value
results.evidence: Observed in Deep Chain (CFG-028): B=LvlB-None -> C/D/E remained visible; isSectionVisible() treats None product as valid value; KNOWN AMBIGUITY per FINDING-1

results.title: Add to Cart Disabled During Configuration Loading State
results.evidence: Partial verification: After full load, Add to cart correctly enabled (configLoading=false, required sections filled); Button has disabled class mechanism confirmed; Full throttling test not possible without Chrome DevTools in Edge session

results.title: Default Values Not Applied to Hidden Sections on PDP Load
results.evidence: Tire Type NOT in DOM on initial load; Price=$300.00 (only visible section defaults contribute: Aluminum $0); Hidden section default NOT contributing to price; updateWithDefaultValues() correctly skips hidden sections

results.title: Circular Dependency Does Not Crash Storefront Widget
results.evidence: Requires admin REST API access to attempt creating circular dependencies (A.dependsOn=B, B.dependsOn=A). Not testable from storefront-only session

results.title: GA4 add_to_cart Event Must Include Configured Total Value - VCST-4856 Fix Verification
results.evidence: VCST-4856 FIX VERIFIED. Configured product (Aluminum + Standard + Slick) with displayed price $345.00. GA4 dataLayer add_to_cart event: value=345, items[0].price=345, currency=USD, quantity=1. The event now reports the CONFIGURED total price, NOT the base price ($300). view_item event correctly shows base price $300. Fix confirmed in version 2.46.0-pr-2225-572f-572f0087.

consoleErrors: No JS errors on any tested PDP. Only non-blocking 404 for one external image (Honda CRF450RX) on Bike with options page
cleanup: Cart cleared after each test. No test orders placed.
